regions.text: Pleasure and pain are feelings. We have feelings of pleasure and pain. Here are some pleasures.
He is on the sand at the seaside, looking at and hearing the sound of the waves and warming himself in the sun. These are pleasures.
Now he is taking a swim in the sea. He is swimming through the waves. He is a good swimmer. To a good swimmer, swimming is a pleasure.
Now he is resting in the sun again after his swim. After the water the sun on his skin is a pleasure to him.
